zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Peronne於1069年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，她的父親Robert De Péronne II24歲，母親Berthilde d'Avesnes20歲。她和Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1132年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peronne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Deno, Dino, Francesco, Orazio, Vito.
Italian: from an augmentative of the personal name   Pero  .

variants.name: Pero
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Pero, a variant of Piero ‘Peter’ (see Pieri ).
Galician: from the personal name Pero, Galician equivalent of Peter .
Portuguese: habitational name from any of the places called Pero.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Peronne was born in 1069, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Robert De Péronne II, was 24 and her mother, Berthilde d'Avesnes, was 20. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune. She died in 1132, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Peronne est née en 1069, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert De Péronne II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Berthilde d'Avesnes, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune. Elle est décédée en 1132, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Peronne 1069 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Péronne II 24 und ihre Mutter Berthilde d'Avesnes 20. Sie hatte mit Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1132 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Peronne è nata il nel 1069 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Robert De Péronne II, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Berthilde d'Avesnes, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune. Morì nel 1132, nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Peronneが1069年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Robert De Péronne IIは24歳，母Berthilde d'Avesnesは20歳であった。彼女はRobert "le Gros" IV de Bethuneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1132年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Peronne(이)가 1069년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Péronne II(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berthilde d'Avesnes(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1132년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Peronne nasceu em 1069, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert De Péronne II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Berthilde d'Avesnes, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune. Ela faleceu em 1132, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Peronne родилась в 1069 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert De Péronne II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Berthilde d'Avesnes, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune. Она умерла в 1132 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Peronne nació en 1069, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert De Péronne II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Berthilde d'Avesnes, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune. Murió en 1132, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
